column1: # NaviCore custom partition table (16 MB flash).
# Rows 0-5 are BYTE-IDENTICAL to the stock esp32 "min_spiffs" table (which topped
# out at 0x400000 / 4 MB). Keeping the `spiffs` row (the config LittleFS at
# 0x3D0000) unmoved means /config.json is NOT reformatted on the next boot.
# Row 6 `clips` fills the previously-unused 0x400000..0x1000000 span (12 MB) of
# the N16R8 module as a SECOND LittleFS (record/replay clip library)
# its own label. OTA (ota_0/ota_1) and config are untouched.
# REQUIRES the build to pass PartitionScheme=custom + FlashSize=16M (see
# tools/build-firmware.ps1 / .sh) and the 16 MB custom bootloader (the flasher
